title: Tyler Warchola
content:
People.ContactEmail twarchola@mccarthy.ca
- University of Alberta
Tyler Warchola is an associate in McCarthy Tétrault’s National Tax Group, based in Calgary. Tyler maintains a general tax practice, which includes domestic and cross-border tax planning, reorganizations and mergers and acquisitions.
Tyler has assisted in advising on the Canadian tax aspect of several signfiicant M&A and capital markets transactions.

#### Notable transactions include:
- The sale of Cordelio Power, an independent power producer in Canada and the United States, to Pattern Energy Group
- Altius Minerals Corp.’s $520 million acquisition of Lithium Royalty Corp.
- Marimaca Copper Corp.’s $409 million global offering, which included a $257 million Canadian treasury and secondary public offering of common shares in Marimaca Copper Corp.
- Tributary Group, LLC’s strategic investment in Sofworks Group Inc.
- Enbridge Inc.’s offering of three tranches of senior notes in the aggregate principal amount of US$1.5 billion.
Tyler received his Juris Doctor (with distinction) from the University of Alberta in 2023. During law school, Tyler was head of the editing committee for the Alberta Law Review, an executive member of the University of Alberta Law and Business Association, and served as a Writing Fellow for the first-year Legal Research and Writing course. He also participated in the Donald G.H. Bowman National Tax Moot Court Competition where his team placed second. Tyler also holds a Bachelor of Science (Honours) in Geology and a Master of Science in Geochemistry from the University of Alberta.
- SECURE Waste Infrastructure to be acquired by GFL Environmental for C$6.4B April 13, 2026
- Cordelio Power Acquired by Pattern Energy April 2, 2026
- Altius acquires Lithium Royalty Corp. for total consideration of approximately C$520M March 6, 2026
- Marimaca Copper Corp. completes a C$409M global treasury and secondary offering February 26, 2026
- Potentia Renewables closes financing for Skyview 2 Battery Energy Storage System project January 28, 2026
- International Paper to sell Global Cellulose Fibers business to American Industrial Partners for US$1.5B December 23, 2025
- Blog Post OECD releases “Side-by-Side” Administrative Guidance Package January 21, 2026
- Blog Post Key Takeaways from McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: September 2025 October 31, 2025
